essence: Builds walls and structures using bricks, mortar, and precision craftsmanship.

identity.title: Bricklayer
identity.summary: Constructs walls, foundations, and structures by laying bricks and blocks with accuracy and skill.

salary.notes: Experienced bricklayers and contractors can earn significantly more depending on demand.

lifestyle.description: Bricklayers work on construction sites, building walls and structures with precision. The role is physical and outdoors, suiting people who enjoy hands-on work and craftsmanship.
